name: Sprint Scope Change (Added / Removed)
query:
WITH sprint_info AS (
    SELECT
        id::text AS sprint_id,
        start_date::date AS s_start,
        COALESCE(complete_date::date, end_date::date, CURRENT_DATE) AS s_end
    FROM clean_jira.sprints
    WHERE 1=1
    [[AND {{sprint_name}}]]
    [[ AND start_date::date >= {{sprint_start_date}} ]]
),
calendar AS (
    SELECT generate_series(
        (SELECT MIN(s_start) FROM sprint_info),
        (SELECT MAX(s_end) FROM sprint_info),
        '1 day'::interval
    )::date AS report_date
)
SELECT
    c.report_date,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN v_facts.calc_code = 'sprint_added_sp_sum' THEN v_facts.value ELSE 0 END), 0) AS added_sp,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN v_facts.calc_code = 'sprint_removed_sp_sum' THEN (v_facts.value * -1) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS removed_sp
FROM calendar c
LEFT JOIN metrics.v_facts
    ON v_facts.full_date::date = c.report_date
    AND v_facts.entity_type = 'sprint'
    AND v_facts.entity_id IN (SELECT sprint_id FROM sprint_info)
    AND v_facts.calc_code IN ('sprint_added_sp_sum', 'sprint_removed_sp_sum')
    [[AND {{project_key}}]]
    [[ AND {{issue_type}} -- ]] AND v_facts.slice_rule_id IS NULL
GROUP BY c.report_date
ORDER BY c.report_date ASC
